title: 'Locked and loaded': JD Vance warns US could restart military campaign if Iran talks fail
summary_full: US Vice President JD Vance stated that President Trump is pursuing a diplomatic deal with Iran but is prepared to resume military action if nuclear talks fail. Vance emphasized that the administration is negotiating in good faith, making it clear Iran will not be allowed to obtain a nuclear weapon.
